title: Average PVP Texture Pack
description: Overexaggerates what PVP Packs do Best
body:
This is a Funny Texture Pack that takes the Average PVP Texture Pack and **Overexaggerates it!**

This is a **Work in Progress** Texture Pack as of writing this but I hope y'all enjoy it right now AND when it's 100% Completed!

By the way when you hold the Items you pretty much **can't see them** AND the Icons are to just make it easier to find the Items.
